_meta.description: Phases define session length, sets, bike/iFIT settings, and the checklist of criteria required to UNLOCK the next phase. Progression is manual + gated: you advance when you tick the criteria, not on a fixed calendar.

phases.label: Foundation
unlockCriteria: I can do all Foundation exercises with good form and no pain
Glute bridges feel controlled — I can feel my right glute working
Ankle mob done most days for at least 2 weeks
8-min bike ride feels comfortable, conversational pace
No flare-ups that lasted more than a day after sessions
✅ PT check-in completed — PT has signed off on advancing to Build

phases.label: Build
unlockCriteria: Band exercises feel controlled, no joint strain
Bridge-with-march keeps pelvis level without wobble
12-min ride at higher resistance stays conversational
Scapula work stays pain-free with the band
✅ PT check-in completed — PT has signed off on advancing to Strengthen

phases.label: Strengthen
unlockCriteria: Single-leg bridges keep hips level both sides
18-min ride with hills feels challenging but safe
Prone Y/T/W pain-free through full set

phases.label: Consolidate
unlockCriteria: This is the final phase — the goal is to maintain and test gains
Reassess with PT before deciding what comes next
